data.name: Femdom Wife Game - Zoe
data.detailed_description:
"Femdom Wife Game - Zoe" delivers a story about your vanilla partner turning dominant.

Taking place in a 3D realtime and fully animated game, this femdom game transcribes erotic novelas in its own way. The game has a strong focus on femdom content, such as pussy worship, cuckolding, chastity, foot fetish, etc.

The game includes the following content:

  • Chastity
  • Cum eating
  • Pegging
  • Foot worship
  • Pussy worship
  • Feminization
  • Cuckolding (can be disabled in the settings)

The relationship between you and Zoe is a balance of power. Not everything is to your liking, but Zoe still wants to try new things. Zoe will react to your behavior and will evolve based on your preferences.

data.short_description: "Femdom Wife Game - Zoe" is a relationship simulator. Zoe, your partner, has grown tired of your sex life and wants to try new things. Only she wants to be the one in charge. The game offers both authenticity and immersion. Start your new life with Zoe!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • 處理器: 3 GHz equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 780 3GB/AMD Radeon R9 290X 4GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.11
  • 處理器: 3 GHz equivalent
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 780 3GB/AMD Radeon R9 290X 4GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
